mapper.select: SELECT * FROM university ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM university WHERE province = #{province} ORDER BY id
SELECT * FROM university WHERE city = #{city} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO university (name, address, city, code, level, official_website, graduate_school_name, graduate_school_website, A_B, province, introduction, type, logo_url, region) VALUES (#{name}, #{address}, #{city}, #{code}, #{level}, #{officialWebsite}, #{graduateSchoolName}, #{graduateSchoolWebsite}, #{AB}, #{province}, #{introduction}, #{type}, #{logoUrl}, #{region})
mapper.update: UPDATE university SET name = #{name}, address = #{address}, city = #{city}, code = #{code}, level = #{level}, official_website = #{officialWebsite}, graduate_school_name = #{graduateSchoolName}, graduate_school_website = #{graduateSchoolWebsite}, A_B = #{AB}, province = #{province}, introduction = #{introduction}, type = #{type}, logo_url = #{logoUrl}, region = #{region} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS college_id, d.name AS college_name, d.introduction, m.id AS major_id, m.name AS major_name, pd.year, pd.retest_score AS reexamScore, pd.lowest_score AS minScore, pd.highest_score AS maxScore, pd.average_score AS avgScore FROM department d LEFT JOIN major m ON d.id = m.department_id LEFT JOIN postgraduate_data pd ON m.id = pd.major_id WHERE d.university_id = #{universityId} ORDER BY d.name, m.name, pd.year
SELECT * FROM university ORDER BY collection_num DESC, id
mapper.update: UPDATE university SET collection_num = collection_num + #{increment} WHERE id = #{universityId} AND (#{increment} > 0 OR collection_num > 0)
